title: Opening for Software Engineer at iCliniq

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at iCliniq
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
